title: StartContinuousExportResponse
description: StartContinuousExportResponse schema from Amazon Application Discovery Service API

exportId.description: The unique ID assigned to this export.

s3Bucket.description: The name of the s3 bucket where the export data parquet files are stored.

startTime.description: The timestamp representing when the continuous export was started.

dataSource.description: The type of data collector used to gather this data.

schemaStorageConfig.description: A dictionary which describes how the data is stored.
